note: Machine-readable mirror of docs/ADAPTER_MATURITY.md. Keep both in sync; scripts/check_adapter_maturity.py enforces parity in CI.

adapters.name: LiteLLMCompleter
adapters.production_notes: Main model-call wrapper through LiteLLM/Instructor.

adapters.name: ChromaStore
adapters.production_notes: Optional vector trace store; depends on Chroma.

adapters.name: InProcessBackend
adapters.production_notes: Offline lexical memory, process-local.

adapters.name: Mem0Backend
adapters.production_notes: Wraps sync mem0 behind the async protocol.

adapters.name: GraphitiBackend
adapters.production_notes: Requires Graphiti/Neo4j and model/embed clients. Export is approximate/lossy.

adapters.name: LocalFilesystemBackend
adapters.production_notes: File confinement implemented. Local exec disabled by default and is not a sandbox.

adapters.name: DaytonaBackend
adapters.production_notes: Named workspace seam only; raises MissingExtraError on construction.

adapters.name: E2BBackend
adapters.production_notes: Named workspace seam only; raises MissingExtraError on construction.

adapters.name: OpenHandsBackend
adapters.production_notes: Named workspace seam only; raises MissingExtraError on construction.

adapters.name: InMemoryWorkStore
adapters.production_notes: Process-local work ledger for tests/demos.

adapters.name: SqlWorkStore
adapters.production_notes: Durable SQL ledger with optimistic concurrency.

adapters.name: DBOSDispatcher
adapters.production_notes: Thin dispatch bridge; the Coactra ledger remains source of truth.

adapters.name: TemporalDispatcher
adapters.production_notes: Thin dispatch bridge; not a full workflow backend.

adapters.name: DaprDispatcher
adapters.production_notes: Thin dispatch bridge.

adapters.name: MCPTasksAdapter
adapters.production_notes: MCP task shape bridge.

adapters.name: LangGraphEngine
adapters.production_notes: Optional LangGraph procedure runner; non-durable (use DurableLangGraphEngine for resume).

adapters.name: DurableLangGraphEngine
adapters.production_notes: Requires persistent checkpointer and procedure/version reload after restart.

adapters.name: TemporalEngine
adapters.production_notes: Host supplies Temporal client, workflow definition, task queue, and worker deployment.

adapters.name: PrefectEngine
adapters.production_notes: Resume starts a deployment run carrying prior thread state; host flow owns true resume behavior.

adapters.name: SqliteOrgStore
adapters.production_notes: SQLModel/SQLAlchemy repository.

adapters.name: AsyncPostgresOrgStore
adapters.production_notes: Async facade over the SQL repository using worker-thread offload (see backlog #7 on naming).

adapters.name: OpenFGAAuthorizer
adapters.production_notes: Authorization seam over the OpenFGA SDK.

adapters.name: Neo4jOrgStore
adapters.production_notes: Named seam only; raises MissingExtraError on construction.

adapters.name: InProcessExchanger
adapters.production_notes: Local no-passthrough token exchanger for tests/demos.

adapters.name: KeycloakExchanger
adapters.production_notes: RFC 8693 token exchange over a configured token endpoint; async variant with coactra-agent[oauth].

adapters.name: OfficialA2ATransport
adapters.production_notes: Outbound official A2A SDK adapter.

adapters.name: inbound A2A helpers
adapters.production_notes: make_a2a_executor / build_a2a_app; require a verifier for production use.

adapters.name: FastMCPServer
adapters.production_notes: Named server seam only; raises MissingExtraError on construction.
